Al alcanzar 10031 puntos, se completara la mision y se liberara la <yellow>Horror Pt</yellow>.

You will receive a PSE outfit bonus effect when equipping outfits and
Layering Wear such as Hollow Wanderer or Wonder Seeker.
Your EXP earned and rare item drop rate will increase while an outfit bonus is in
effect. Refer to the Player's Site for detailed information on applicable outfits.

Note: You will lose an active effect if you switch to a non-qualifying outfit in the
middle of the quest.
Also note that PSE effects triggered will be active for this quest only.
